description_long: This is a black pickup truck with a robust and utilitarian design, featuring a double cab and a covered cargo bed at the rear. The front end displays a wide chrome grille and prominent headlights, while the side profile reveals two doors and a set of five-spoke wheels. The rear view shows a tailgate with red taillights and a logo or text on the back, indicating branding. The truck's body is mostly black with some chrome and metallic accents, and the windows are tinted. The vehicle sits relatively high off the ground, suggesting off-road capability. The overall appearance is modern and functional, suitable for both urban and light industrial environments.
description: A black, double-cab pickup truck with a covered cargo bed, chrome accents, and modern styling. It features two doors, tinted windows, and prominent front and rear lights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide chrome grille, headlights, and black hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door cab, black body, and five-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tailgate with red taillights and branding, as well as the covered cargo bed.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, wheels, and side profile.
